<div class="container">

<div class="card">

<h2>About Me</h2>

<p class="about">

Hello! I'm <strong>Prajwal K</strong>, an MBA graduate from
<strong>Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM), Udupi.</strong>

I am passionate about Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, SQL, Excel, Power BI, and Python. I enjoy transforming raw data into meaningful business insights through dashboards, reports, and data visualization.

My goal is to build a successful career as a Data Analyst where I can contribute to business growth using data-driven decision making.

</p>

</div>

<div class="card">

<h2>Education</h2>

<h3>Master of Business Administration (MBA)</h3>

<p>Shri Madhwa Vadiraja Institute of Technology and Management (SMVITM), Udupi</p>

</div>

<div class="card">

<div class="card">

<h2>Projects</h2>

<div class="projects">

<div class="project">

<h3>Petrol Price Analysis</h3>

<p>
Analyzed petrol prices across Indian states by comparing Central Excise Duty, State VAT, and dealer commissions. Built analytical reports to identify price differences.
</p>

</div>

<div class="project">

<h3>Power BI Dashboard</h3>

<p>
Designed interactive dashboards with KPIs, slicers, charts, and drill-through reports to analyze business performance.
</p>

</div>

<div class="project">

<h3>SQL Data Analysis</h3>

<p>
Created SQL queries using Joins, CTEs, Window Functions, Aggregate Functions, and Subqueries for business reporting.
</p>

</div>

<div class="project">

<h3>Excel Analytics</h3>

<p>
Developed automated reports using Pivot Tables, XLOOKUP, INDEX-MATCH, Power Query, and advanced Excel formulas.
</p>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="card">

<h2>Career Objective</h2>

<p class="about">

To obtain a challenging position as a Data Analyst where I can apply my analytical skills, business knowledge, and technical expertise to help organizations make informed decisions through data.

</p>

</div>
